issues.description: Action should be ForceDiscard or modify cost attribute, not PowerBoost with negative amount. The card text says 'Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost', which modifies the cost stat, not power. PowerBoost is incorrect mechanic.
Missing condition to check if any Character has cost 0 before applying second action. Card text explicitly states 'if there is a Character with a cost of 0' — this is a conditional requirement.
Target should specify 'up to 1' explicitly; current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is ambiguous about quantity limit.
